name: Soifon
description:
Tomboy captain gets flamed by big titty lieutenant and now has an identity crisis. Oh nyoh!!

So basically Rangiku and Soifon got into a heated argument revolving around cats to dogs. After this stupid fight reached a conclusion, Rangiku just called her titless and walked off. Now Soifon sits in her quarters, wondering if she's right.

Sauce: Jesses Schickler

PS: MILT (Man I Love Tomboys)
creator: wrthe
